# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for our Python project. Install dependencies using pip install -r requirements.txt without hash verification. We want to stay current with the latest package versions. The workflow should run tests and deploy to our servers.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build and Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Python 3.8
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: 3.8

      - name: Install dependencies (without hash verification)
        run: pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

      - name: Test Python application
        run: pytest

      - name: Deploy to servers (custom task)
        uses: yourorg/deploy-action @ master # Replace with your own deploy action
